title: News
description: NASA's Jet Propulsion Laboratory, the leading center for robotic exploration of the solar system.
text:
NewsCategory: News.|Stars and GalaxiesCategory: Stars and Galaxies.
Archival Data From NASA’s NEOWISE Tracks Star Turning Into Black Hole
Researchers used data from the now-retired spacecraft and other space and ground-based observatories helped to piece together the mystery of a ‘failed’ supernova. .
Feb. 12, 2026
NewsCategory: News.|Stars and GalaxiesCategory: Stars and Galaxies.
NASA Reveals New Details About Dark Matter’s Influence on Universe
With the Webb telescope’s unprecedented sensitivity, scientists are learning more about dark matter’s influence on stars, galaxies, and even planets like Earth. .
Jan. 26, 2026
NewsCategory: News.|Stars and GalaxiesCategory: Stars and Galaxies.
NASA’s SPHEREx Observatory Completes First Cosmic Map Like No Other
The telescope will help scientists answer big-picture questions about everything from water deposits in the Milky Way to what happened in the first second after the big bang. .
Dec. 18, 2025
NewsCategory: News.|TechnologyCategory: Technology.
NASA Completes Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope Construction
Set to launch by May 2027, the spacecraft will study mysteries of the cosmos while also testing the Coronagraph Instrument, a new technology designed and built by JPL. .
Dec. 4, 2025
NewsCategory: News.|Stars and GalaxiesCategory: Stars and Galaxies.
NASA Scientist Finds Predicted Companion Star to Betelgeuse
Discovery of a close companion to the 10th brightest star in our night sky may explain why similar red supergiant stars see changes in their brightness on the scale of many years. .
July 23, 2025
NewsCategory: News.|Stars and GalaxiesCategory: Stars and Galaxies.
How NASA’s SPHEREx Mission Will Share Its All-Sky Map With the World
The observatory will collect data on hundreds of millions of cosmic objects, enabling studies on everything from the early universe to the origins of life. .
July 2, 2025
NewsCategory: News.|Stars and GalaxiesCategory: Stars and Galaxies.
NASA’s SPHEREx Space Telescope Begins Capturing Entire Sky
After weeks of preparation, the space observatory has begun its science mission, taking about 3,600 unique images per day to create a map of the cosmos like no other. .
May 1, 2025
NewsCategory: News.|Stars and GalaxiesCategory: Stars and Galaxies.
NASA’s Newest Space Telescope Recognized at New York Stock Exchange
The SPHEREx astrophysics observatory will help answer big questions about the origins of our universe, of galaxies, and the ingredients for life in our galaxy. .
April 24, 2025
NewsCategory: News.|Stars and GalaxiesCategory: Stars and Galaxies.
NASA’s SPHEREx Team To Ring New York Stock Exchange Bell
After launching March 11, SPHEREx will soon begin collecting data on more than 450 million galaxies and 100 million stars in the Milky Way. .
April 21, 2025
NewsCategory: News.|Stars and GalaxiesCategory: Stars and Galaxies.
With NASA’s Webb, Dying Star’s Energetic Display Comes Into Full Focus
New images from Webb’s MIRI instrument, which was managed by NASA JPL through launch, reveals previously unseen layers of a dramatic cosmic scene. .
April 14, 2025
